title: Maldives tells UK it does not recognise Chagos Islands deal with Mauritius
summary_full: The Maldives is threatening international legal action to press its claim for control of the Chagos Islands.
summary_public: The Maldives is threatening international legal action to press its claim for control of the Chagos Islands.
